problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Topological insulator surface state conduction may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
